onboarding.signInTitle: Sign in to unlock sync & teams
onboarding.benefit1: Access your songs on any device — phone, tablet, or laptop
onboarding.benefit2: Share setlists and songs with your worship team
onboarding.benefit3: Your data is always backed up to the cloud
onboarding.privacyNote: We only use your Google account for authentication. No data is shared with third parties.
onboarding.slide1Desc: Store all your ChordPro songs in organised books. Search by title, artist, key, or tag.
onboarding.slide2Desc: Write and edit songs in ChordPro format with a side-by-side preview. Transpose with one click.
onboarding.slide3Desc: Build service setlists, reorder songs, and present them in full-screen performance mode.
onboarding.slide4Desc: Full-screen display with pedal navigation support. Keep your hands on your instrument.
